violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Sausages thawing in water. Thaw under cold running water.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors need cleaned and painted.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. -Crock pot of food located below bug zapper.
